message:
fix(decoding): restore buffer position on codec error

When a codec returns ASX_DECODE_ERROR during decoding, the codec may
have partially advanced the buffer's rd_pos. Previously this left the
decode pipeline in an inconsistent state — subsequent decode attempts
would process from an arbitrary buffer position, producing garbage.

Fix: Save rd_pos before calling the codec and restore it on error,
ensuring the buffer remains at a consistent position for the caller
to handle the error (retry, skip, or abort).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
